description_long: This clothing store features a quaint stone facade with a dark gabled roof and a prominent front entrance. The storefront includes a large rectangular display window, flanked by two wall-mounted lanterns, and a small garden bed with flowers beneath the window. A spiral metal staircase on the side leads to a second-floor door, suggesting a possible upper-level space. The rear of the building has a large arched window, while the side and back walls are constructed from the same light-colored stone. The entrance is accessed via a tiled path, and the store's signage is mounted above the front door in a decorative script. The overall design blends rustic charm with functional urban elements.
description: A charming stone-clad clothing store with a large display window, decorative signage, and a spiral staircase leading to an upper door.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, large display window, signage, lanterns, and a flower bed.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the spiral staircase and upper-level door, with the stone wall uninterrupted by windows.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain stone wall and the roof, with the spiral staircase partially visible.
description_view_3: The back view features a large arched window and the tiled path extending from the rear.
attribute_storefront_signage: Decorative script sign above the front door, tan background with white and gold text, reading 'Sweet Boutique'.
attribute_display_windows: One large rectangular display window on the front facade, spanning most of the storefront width.
attribute_mannequins: One mannequin visible through the display window, positioned centrally.
